description: The Camera di Controllo is a collegial body of the 'Ndrangheta, a Mafia-type organization in Calabria, Italy. Established after the Second 'Ndrangheta war (1985-1991) to settle disputes and coordinate activities among clans. It is composed of leading members and functions as a hierarchical superordinate authority. The body has contributed to a decrease in homicides in the Reggio Calabria province.

country_links.evidence_quote: A Camera di Controllo also exists in Canada, according to 'confidential information' of the police 'which they believe to be reliable.' It consists of six or seven Toronto -area men, who co-ordinate activities and resolves disputes among the Siderno Group in Southern Ontario.
country_links.context: The 'Ndrangheta's Camera di Controllo operates in Canada, coordinating activities and resolving disputes among the Siderno Group in Southern Ontario.
